languages.text: {n}Скрипучий голос сервитора почти перекрывает вибрирующие слова ксеноса.{/n} "Имя... кануло... во времени... ничтожный. Был тем... кто покорял... твердь... называясь... геомантом".

{n}The servitor's creaking voice almost overlaps with the xenos's vibrating words.{/n} "The name... has... faded... in time... lowly one. I was once one... who conquered... the firmament... I was called... Geomancer."
languages.original_text: {n}Скрипучий голос сервитора почти перекрывает вибрирующие слова ксеноса.{/n} "Имя... кануло... во времени... ничтожный. Был тем... кто покорял... твердь... называясь... геомантом".

traits.locale_text: {n}The servitor's creaking voice almost overlaps with the xenos's vibrating words.{/n} "The name... has... faded... in time... lowly one. I was once one... who conquered... the firmament... I was called... geomancer."

languages.text: {n}机仆嘎吱的转译声几乎与异形震颤的话语重叠在一起。{/n}“名讳……已……消逝……在时间……卑贱者。我曾是……征服苍穹之人……被尊为……地卜师。”
languages.original_text: {n}The servitor's creaking voice almost overlaps with the xenos's vibrating words.{/n} "The name... has... faded... in time... lowly one. I was once one... who conquered... the firmament... I was called... Geomancer."

traits.locale_text: {n}机仆嘎吱的转译声几乎与异形震颤的话语重叠在一起。{/n}“名讳……已……消逝……在时间……卑贱者。我曾是……征服苍穹之人……被尊为……地卜师。”

languages.text: {n}La chirriante voz del servidor empieza a solaparse con las vibraciones del xenos.{/n} «Mi nombre... se... pierde... en la historia... escoria. En mis tiempos... conquisté... el firmamento... Me llamaban... geomante».
languages.original_text: {n}The servitor's creaking voice almost overlaps with the xenos's vibrating words.{/n} "The name... has... faded... in time... lowly one. I was once one... who conquered... the firmament... I was called... Geomancer."

traits.locale_text: {n}La chirriante voz del servidor empieza a solaparse con las vibraciones del xenos.{/n} «Mi nombre... se... pierde... en la historia... escoria. En mis tiempos... conquisté... el firmamento... Me llamaban... geomante».

languages.text: {n}La voix grinçante du servitor se superpose presque sur les paroles vibrantes du xénos.{/n} « Mon nom... s'est... perdu... dans le temps... {mf|inférieur|inférieure}. Je me suis... trouvé... au firmament... Géomancien... d'une dynastie. »
languages.original_text: {n}The servitor's creaking voice almost overlaps with the xenos's vibrating words.{/n} "The name... has... faded... in time... lowly one. I was once one... who conquered... the firmament... I was called... Geomancer."

traits.locale_text: {n}La voix grinçante du servitor se superpose presque sur les paroles vibrantes du xénos.{/n} « Mon nom... s'est... perdu... dans le temps... {mf|inférieur|inférieure}. Je me suis... trouvé... au firmament... Géomancien... d'une dynastie. »

languages.text: {n}Hizmetörün gıcırdayan sesi, zenonun titreyen kelimeleriyle neredeyse örtüşüyor.{/n} "İsmim... Zamanla... Silinip... Gitti. Bir zamanlar... Gök... Kubbe... Fatihiydim... Yerbaz... Olarak... Bilinirdim."
languages.original_text: {n}The servitor's creaking voice almost overlaps with the xenos's vibrating words.{/n} "The name... has... faded... in time... lowly one. I was once one... who conquered... the firmament... I was called... Geomancer."

traits.locale_text: {n}Hizmetörün gıcırdayan sesi, zenonun titreyen kelimeleriyle neredeyse örtüşüyor.{/n} "İsmim... Zamanla... Silinip... Gitti. Bir zamanlar... Gök... Kubbe... Fatihiydim... Yerbaz... Olarak... Bilinirdim."

languages.text: {n}Die knisternde Stimme des Servitors wiederholt die vibrierenden Worte des Xenos.{/n} "Der Name ... ist ... mit der Zeit verblasst ... niederes Wesen. Einst beherrschte ... ich das ... Firmament ... Ich war ein ... Geomant."
languages.original_text: {n}The servitor's creaking voice almost overlaps with the xenos's vibrating words.{/n} "The name... has... faded... in time... lowly one. I was once one... who conquered... the firmament... I was called... Geomancer."

traits.locale_text: {n}Die knisternde Stimme des Servitors wiederholt die vibrierenden Worte des Xenos.{/n} "Der Name ... ist ... mit der Zeit verblasst ... niederes Wesen. Einst beherrschte ... ich das ... Firmament ... Ich war ein ... Geomant."

languages.text: {n}奉仕者の軋む声は、異形の者の振動する言葉とほぼ重なる。{/n}「名前は... 時と共に... 忘れ去られた... 卑しい者よ。かつては... 天を征服した者... 地術師と呼ばれた。」
languages.original_text: {n}The servitor's creaking voice almost overlaps with the xenos's vibrating words.{/n} "The name... has... faded... in time... lowly one. I was once one... who conquered... the firmament... I was called... geomancer."

traits.locale_text: {n}奉仕者の軋む声は、異形の者の振動する言葉とほぼ重なる。{n}「名前は... 時と共に... 忘れ去られた... 卑しい者よ。かつては... 天を征服した者... 地術師と呼ばれた。」
